title: Leptochilus × simplicifrons
intro: Leptochilus × simplicifrons, commonly known as the hybrid polypody fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the Aspleniaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, and protect against cell damage. The bioactive constituents of Leptochilus × simplicifrons include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and triterpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In herbal medicine, Leptochilus × simplicifrons is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is used to treat a range of ailments, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
